mapper.select: SELECT n.NOTICE_ID AS noticeId, n.NOTICE_TYPE AS noticeType, n.TITLE AS title, n.CONTENT AS content, n.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, n.IS_FIXED AS isFixed, n.USE_YN AS useYn, n.CREATOR_ID AS creatorId, u.USER_NAME AS creatorName, DATE_FORMAT(n.CREATED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM TB_NOTICE n LEFT JOIN TB_USER u ON n.CREATOR_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE n.NOTICE_TYPE = #{noticeType} AND (n.USE_YN IS NULL OR n.USE_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY n.IS_FIXED DESC, n.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_NOTICE (NOTICE_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, IS_FIXED, USE_YN, CREATOR_ID) VALUES (#{noticeType}, #{title}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{isFixed}, 'N'), 'Y', #{creatorId})
